mapper.sql: report_no, user_no, title, content, place, category, status, admin_reply, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility_report (user_no, title, content, place, category, status) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{place}, #{category}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'RECEIVED'))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM facility_report WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY report_no DESC
SELECT FROM facility_report ORDER BY report_no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE facility_report SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}
UPDATE facility_report SET admin_reply = #{reply}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM facility_report ORDER BY report_no DESC LIMIT #{limit}
